generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🇺🇸 Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring our allies can stand together when it counts. The recent NATO exercises proved that only 62% of European partners met their defense spending commitments. When crises hit, we can't afford to rely on hollow promises. Stronger domestic production means stronger deterrence and fewer burdens on our troops. #NationalSecurityFirst
